channel.title: GameZipper - Free Browser Games
channel.description: Play 25+ free online games instantly in your browser. No downloads, no signups. Snake, 2048, Brick Breaker and more!

item.title: Snake Game - Play Free Online
item.description: Classic snake game with smooth controls and high score tracking. Play free at GameZipper.

item.title: 2048 Puzzle - Play Free Online
item.description: The addictive number puzzle game. Play free at GameZipper.

item.title: Brick Breaker - Play Free Online
item.description: Break all the bricks in this classic arcade game. Play free at GameZipper.

item.title: Phantom Blade - Play Free Online
item.description: Fast-paced sword fighting action game. Play free at GameZipper.

item.title: Neon Drift - Play Free Online
item.description: Drift through neon-lit tracks at high speed. Play free at GameZipper.

item.title: Space Shooter - Play Free Online
item.description: Defend Earth from alien invaders. Play free at GameZipper.

item.title: Flappy Wings - Play Free Online
item.description: Navigate through pipes in this addictive flyer. Play free at GameZipper.

item.title: Minesweeper - Play Free Online
item.description: Classic mine-clearing puzzle game. Play free at GameZipper.

item.title: Tetris - Play Free Online
item.description: Stack blocks and clear lines. Play free at GameZipper.
